content: Run the Python unit suite with uv run pytest -q before opening a pull request.
title: Backend Rule 01

content: Store Alembic migration revisions under services/payments/migrations and review generated SQL.
title: Backend Rule 02

content: Every HTTP mutation accepts an Idempotency-Key header and replays the original response.
title: Backend Rule 03

content: Persist timezone-aware UTC timestamps and convert to local time only in presentation code.
title: Backend Rule 04

content: Represent currency amounts with Decimal; binary floating point is forbidden for money.
title: Backend Rule 05

content: Keep FastAPI route handlers thin and delegate business orchestration to service use cases.
title: Backend Rule 06

content: The backend passes mypy in strict mode; do not hide type failures with broad ignores.
title: Backend Rule 07

content: Redis cache entries use a default TTL of 300 seconds and namespaced keys.
title: Backend Rule 08

content: Emit structured JSON audit logs with structlog and include the request identifier.
title: Backend Rule 09

content: Load credentials from environment variables or the secret manager and never commit them.
title: Backend Rule 10

content: Run the frontend package tests with pnpm test before submitting a change.
title: Frontend Rule 01

content: Use Zustand for small client-side application state and keep stores feature-scoped.
title: Frontend Rule 02

content: Generate the TypeScript API client from the pinned OpenAPI schema; do not hand-write endpoints.
title: Frontend Rule 03

content: Compose interface styling with Tailwind utility classes and shared design tokens.
title: Frontend Rule 04

content: Browser end-to-end scenarios run in Playwright against a production build.
title: Frontend Rule 05

content: Component unit tests use Vitest together with Testing Library queries.
title: Frontend Rule 06

content: ESLint enforces code rules and Prettier owns source formatting.
title: Frontend Rule 07

content: Manage remote server state with TanStack React Query instead of copying it into local stores.
title: Frontend Rule 08

content: Send production browser exceptions to Sentry with release and source-map metadata.
title: Frontend Rule 09

content: Read feature flags through ConfigCat and provide deterministic defaults for tests.
title: Frontend Rule 10
